text.title: docker-compose-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for docker-compose-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Equivalent to 0.0.0.0:5432:5432. Database is internet-accessible even with UFW blocking port 5432, because Docker bypasses UFW via iptables DNAT.
